---
title: "Figure: Soil Texture by Plot"
author: "Jared Flater et al."
date: last-modified
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    theme: cosmo
    code-fold: show
    code-tools: true
    self-contained: true
    fig-width: 11
    fig-height: 8
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
  echo: true
---

# Setup

```{r setup}
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)

# Colors matched to actual particle appearance:
#   Sand  → very light cream (sand grains are pale/light)
#   Silt  → dark brown (fine organic-rich dark soil)
#   Clay  → warm tan (clay mineral colour)
texture_colors <- c(
  "Sand" = "#EDE0C4",
  "Silt" = "#5C3317",
  "Clay" = "#C4956A"
)
```

# Data

```{r data}
texture <- read_excel(
  "data/PSA Report - AGRON-McDaniel-Potter-2024.xlsm",
  sheet = "Main Data File format", n_max = 22
) |>
  select(Sample, Sand = S, Silt = T, Clay = C) |>
  separate(Sample, into = c("ID", "Plot"), sep = "_") |>
  mutate(across(c(Plot, Sand, Silt, Clay), as.numeric)) |>
  drop_na() |>
  select(Plot, Sand, Silt, Clay)

# Long format; order fractions from coarse (bottom) to fine (top)
texture_long <- texture |>
  pivot_longer(cols = c(Sand, Silt, Clay),
               names_to  = "Fraction",
               values_to = "Percent") |>
  mutate(
    Fraction = factor(Fraction, levels = c("Sand", "Silt", "Clay")),
    Plot     = factor(Plot, levels = 1:15)
  )

texture_long
```

# Figure

```{r figure, fig.width=11, fig.height=8}
# Label color: white on dark silt, dark brown on light sand/clay
label_colors <- c("Sand" = "#3D2008", "Silt" = "white", "Clay" = "#3D2008")

p <- ggplot(texture_long, aes(x = "", y = Percent, fill = Fraction)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.85, color = "white", linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = paste0(round(Percent, 1), "%"),
        color = Fraction),
    position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5),
    size = 3.2, fontface = "bold", show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  facet_wrap(
    ~ Plot, nrow = 3,
    labeller = as_labeller(function(x) paste("Plot", x))
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values  = texture_colors, name = NULL) +
  scale_color_manual(values = label_colors) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(0, 101)) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Percent (%)") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    panel.background     = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    plot.background      = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    strip.background     = element_rect(fill = "#EDE8E0", color = NA),
    strip.text           = element_text(face = "bold", size = 10),
    panel.grid           = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x          = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x         = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y          = element_text(size = 9),
    legend.position      = "top",
    legend.justification = "center",
    legend.key.size      = unit(0.5, "cm"),
    legend.text          = element_text(size = 10),
    panel.spacing        = unit(0.6, "lines"),
    aspect.ratio         = 1
  )

p
```

# Save

```{r save}
ggsave(
  "SubmissionFiguresTables/Figure_Soil_Texture.tiff",
  plot = p,
  width = 230, height = 170, units = "mm", dpi = 600,
  device = "tiff", compression = "lzw", bg = "white"
)
```
